CONTACTID.TEXT: Hey Officer. What happened here?
Hey Partner, thanks for coming out. I just got here, but it appears to be a Hit and Run.
Do we have a witness?
Try talking to the lady over there. She might know something.
Will do. Thanks for helping out.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Ma'am. Did you call the ambulance?
Yes I did, officer!
Thank you for that. Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ ran on the curb and hit the man as he attempted to cross the road!
Okay. Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I did... but I only remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. Give this officer a statement and you will be free to go on your way.
Thank you officer. Will do.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey Officer. What happened here?
Hey Partner, thanks for coming out. I just got here, but it appears to be a Hit and Run.
Do we have a witness?
Try talking to the lady over there. She might know something.
Will do. Thanks for helping out.
That is all I have for you!
Hey Ma'am. Did you call the ambulance?
Yes I did, officer!
Thank you for that. Can you tell me what happened?
~w~ ran on the curb and hit the man as he attempted to cross the road!
Okay. Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I did... but I only remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. Give this officer a statement and you will be free to go on your way.
Thank you officer. Will do.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hi Chloe. First deployment today?
Hey {0}, nice to see you. Yes the first one today.
So what do we have here?
Seems to be a Hit and Run. Talk to the Woman over there she will update you.
"Okay. Ehm.. Let's go for a drink when your shift is over.
Sure why not... see ya later.
Hello Ma'am. I'm officer {0} from the {1}. Can you describe what happened?
Hi, yes this is my boyfriend who got hit!
Oh, I didn't know. So why is he hurt?
~w~ came out of this alleyway and hit him!
Can you tell me the vehicle's license plate?
Only partly. I remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
I will run that in the Police computer and see what's popping up. I have no more questions.
Alright then. Bye
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hey. How can I assist?
Hi buddy, please help me with the accident. It's a Hit and Run.
Okay? How do you know that?
The woman is the guys wife. She told me that. But ask her yourself.
Will do so. Anything else?
Nope. That is all I know!
Hello Miss. My name is {0} from the {1}. What happened?
Hello officer! Some stupid dude ran him over.
Can you describe the vehicle or do you know the type?
~w~ came around with a high rate of speed. I think he lost control, that is why he hit my husband!
Okay. Do you remember the vehicle's license plate?
I already thought about that, but I just remember the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Thanks. That's more then in the most cases. Maybe we get a hit.
Thank you officer. Please get this bastard.
I don't know anything more. Sorry.
Hi, you requested backup. How can i help?
Hey Partner, thanks for coming. I just arrived, but it looks that this accident wasn't self-inflicted.
Okay, Do we have a witness who maybe knows something?
Yes. One of the shop owners came out when i got here. Talk to him.
At least something. I will question him.
That is all I have for you!
Hi Sir. My name is {0} from the {1}. Do you want to tell me anything?
Yes, officer {0}. I called 911!
Thank you. Can you tell me what happened to the woman?
~w~ parked out and hit the woman in reverse and then just left the area.
Did you see the vehicle's license plate?
I was still in my shop so i don't know the complete plate. Only the last 3 digits. They are ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. My partner will maybe ask you also some questions.
Okay.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
